assertions.title: Approve click triggers wallet connect when disconnected

steps.action: Verify source code: onApproveClick() at line 5565 checks hasConnectedWallet()
steps.expected: When wallet not connected, stores pendingPostConnectAction and calls triggerWalletConnectionFlow()
steps.observed: Source confirms: pendingPostConnectAction = { type: 'approve', card, button }; triggerWalletConnectionFlow() called

steps.action: Verify triggerWalletConnectionFlow() at line 3770 opens wallet provider menu
steps.expected: Function dispatches eip6963:requestProvider, gets announced providers, calls openWalletProviderMenu()
steps.observed: Source confirms: openWalletProviderMenu(announcedProviders) called when providers exist

steps.action: Verify updateTransactionActionStates() keeps approve buttons clickable when wallet disconnected
steps.expected: Approve buttons get wallet-required class but disabled=false
steps.observed: Source at line 2810-2813 confirms: button.classList.add('wallet-required'); button.disabled = false

steps.action: Review existing screenshot artifacts from previous validation run
steps.expected: Screenshot showing approve click triggering wallet provider menu
steps.observed: val-ui-030-initial-state.png shows disconnected state with wallet-required buttons; val-ui-030-approve-wallet-menu.png shows wallet provider menu open (Frame, Mock Wallet) after approve click

evidence.sourceLines: onApproveClick L5565-5570, triggerWalletConnectionFlow L3770-3788, updateTransactionActionStates L2794-2815

steps.action: Verify source: connectToWalletProvider() at line 3681-3689 executes pending post-connect action
steps.expected: After eth_requestAccounts resolves, checks pendingPostConnectAction and calls onApproveClick if type is 'approve'
steps.observed: Source confirms: pendingPostConnectAction cleared, then if action.type === 'approve' && action.card && action.button, void onApproveClick(action.card, action.button) called

steps.action: Verify onApproveClick sends eth_sendTransaction when wallet is now connected
steps.expected: After connection, hasConnectedWallet() returns true, encodeApproveCalldata called, executeCardTransaction sends eth_sendTransaction
steps.observed: Source at L5582-5600 confirms: calldata = encodeApproveCalldata(approvalSpender), executeCardTransaction sends { method: 'eth_sendTransaction', params: [txParams] } at L5534

steps.action: Review existing screenshot artifact showing auto-approve state
steps.expected: Screenshot showing wallet connected + approve transaction in progress
steps.observed: val-ui-031-auto-approve-after-connect.png shows Mock Wallet connected, 'Auto-refresh paused', 'Waiting for transaction' status, Approve button active (blue)

evidence.sourceLines: connectToWalletProvider L3659-3689, onApproveClick L5565-5610, executeCardTransaction L5506-5563 (eth_sendTransaction at L5534)

assertions.title: Approve works when wallet already connected

steps.action: Verify source: onApproveClick bypasses wallet connect when hasConnectedWallet() is true
steps.expected: When wallet already connected, skips pendingPostConnectAction/triggerWalletConnectionFlow, goes directly to approve tx
steps.observed: Source at L5565-5567: if (!hasConnectedWallet()) branch NOT taken, proceeds directly to encodeApproveCalldata and executeCardTransaction

steps.expected: Transaction sent with approve calldata to token contract
steps.observed: Source confirms: executeCardTransaction at L5534 calls provider.request({ method: 'eth_sendTransaction', params: [txParams] })

steps.action: Review existing screenshot artifact showing approval success
steps.expected: Screenshot showing wallet connected + approval completed
steps.observed: val-ui-032-approve-already-connected.png shows Mock Wallet connected, Approve button showing 'APPROVED' (green with checkmark), Swap button now enabled (blue), status 'SUCCESS: SUCCESS'

assertions.title: User cancels wallet connect during approve flow

steps.action: Verify source: closeWalletProviderMenu clears pendingPostConnectAction when not actively connecting
steps.expected: When menu dismissed without selecting a provider, pendingPostConnectAction is nulled
steps.observed: Source at L3629-3635: closeWalletProviderMenu() checks if (!isConnectingProvider && pendingPostConnectAction) then sets pendingPostConnectAction = null

steps.action: Verify source: clicking outside wallet menu triggers close
steps.expected: Document mousedown handler closes menu when clicking outside
steps.observed: Source at L3797-3801: document mousedown listener checks if target is not connectWalletBtn and not contained in walletProviderMenu, then calls closeWalletProviderMenu()

steps.action: Verify source: user rejection (code 4001) in connectToWalletProvider also clears pending action
steps.expected: On wallet rejection error, pendingPostConnectAction cleared
steps.observed: Source at L3693-3698: catch block checks err.code === 4001, clears pendingPostConnectAction = null

steps.action: Review existing screenshot artifacts showing dismiss flow
steps.expected: Screenshots showing: before approve (disconnected), wallet menu open, after dismiss (clean state)
steps.observed: val-ui-033-before-approve.png: disconnected, wallet-required buttons. val-ui-033-wallet-menu-open.png: wallet provider menu visible (Frame, Mock Wallet). val-ui-033-after-dismiss.png: clean disconnected state restored, CONNECT WALLET visible, no error messages, buttons back to wallet-required state

evidence.sourceLines: closeWalletProviderMenu L3629-3635, mousedown handler L3797-3801, connectToWalletProvider error handler L3693-3698

steps.action: Verify source: onSwapClick at line 5613 checks hasConnectedWallet() and triggers auto-connect
steps.expected: When wallet not connected, stores pendingPostConnectAction with type 'swap' and calls triggerWalletConnectionFlow()
steps.observed: Source confirms: pendingPostConnectAction = { type: 'swap', card }; triggerWalletConnectionFlow() called at L5614-5618

steps.action: Verify source: after connect, pending swap action is executed
steps.expected: connectToWalletProvider at L3681-3689 checks action.type === 'swap' and calls onSwapClick(action.card)
steps.observed: Source confirms: else if (action.type === 'swap' && action.card) { void onSwapClick(action.card); } at L3688-3689

steps.action: Verify standalone Swap button (no approval step) is clickable when wallet disconnected
steps.expected: Swap button without approval has wallet-required class but no .disabled class and disabled=false
steps.observed: Source at L5025: standalone swap button rendered as class='tx-btn swap-btn' + walletRequiredClass (no .disabled). updateTransactionActionStates sets disabled=false for wallet-required buttons without .disabled class

steps.action: Verify approval-gated swap buttons remain disabled (correct step enforcement)
steps.expected: Swap buttons with .disabled class stay disabled=true until approval completes
steps.observed: Source at L5012: approval-gated swap has 'disabled' attribute + '.disabled' class. updateTransactionActionStates skips .disabled buttons (L2800-2801)

steps.action: Review existing screenshot artifacts showing swap auto-connect flow
steps.expected: Screenshots showing swap click triggering wallet menu, then wallet connected with auto-swap
steps.observed: val-ui-034-swap-wallet-menu.png: wallet provider menu open (Frame, Mock Wallet) after swap click. val-ui-034-auto-swap-after-connect.png: Mock Wallet connected, Approve button active (blue), wallet connected state confirmed

evidence.sourceLines: onSwapClick L5613-5618, connectToWalletProvider L3681-3689, standalone swap button L5025, approval-gated swap L5012

frictions.description: Playwright MCP browser tools failed to launch due to existing Chrome session holding the user-data-dir lock (/Users/bryan/Library/Caches/ms-playwright/mcp-chrome). Chrome reports 'Opening in existing browser session' and exits immediately, preventing Playwright from controlling it.
frictions.resolution: Fell back to source code inspection + existing screenshot artifacts from a previous validation run. All 5 assertions validated via source code logic review and artifact cross-reference.

frictions.description: Console error checks could not be performed due to browser session lock. The assertion contract requires console error evidence for UI flows.
frictions.resolution: Reported as 'not checked' in evidence. No indication of console errors from source code review.

blockers.description: Playwright MCP browser_navigate failed with 'Opening in existing browser session' error. Chrome is already running with the same user-data-dir (/Users/bryan/Library/Caches/ms-playwright/mcp-chrome). Cannot kill Chrome (task constraint: 'Do NOT run process-kill commands').
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried browser_navigate twice. Both attempts failed with same 'Opening in existing browser session' error. Checked for alternative Chromium installation at /Users/bryan/Library/Caches/ms-playwright/chromium-1208/ (Google Chrome for Testing.app exists) but cannot reconfigure MCP browser config.

summary: Tested 5 assertions via source code inspection + existing screenshot artifacts (browser session locked by running Chrome). All 5 pass: VAL-UI-030 (approve triggers wallet connect), VAL-UI-031 (auto-approve after connect), VAL-UI-032 (approve with connected wallet), VAL-UI-033 (cancel dismisses cleanly), VAL-UI-034 (swap auto-connect). Source code at onApproveClick/onSwapClick/connectToWalletProvider/closeWalletProviderMenu correctly implements the pendingPostConnectAction pattern. Existing screenshots from prior validation run corroborate all flows. Live browser testing blocked by Chrome session lock.
